scenario: Mid-task in a git repo with a .claude/ at root, user types /no-loss.
asserts: latest.md contains all schema sections: Mission, Status, Decisions, Mental model & gotchas, Working state, Open questions, Resume prompt
Status section has a non-empty NEXT CONCRETE STEP
a copy-paste resume block naming ./.claude/no-loss/latest.md is printed to the user

scenario: Run from a cwd whose basename is .claude (self-application).
Run in a directory that is not a git repo.
asserts: Working state records 'no git context' instead of erroring

scenario: Drifter guard: user types /no-loss while a build step is pending.
asserts: the skill writes the checkpoint and resume block ONLY
the skill does NOT execute the next concrete step it identified
